Program_Description: The Healthy Families Program Provides low-cost health insurance for children of families whose incomes are too high to get no-cost Medi-Cal but still fall below certain income levels.
Target_Population: Families whose incomes are too high for no-cost Medi-Cal but below certain levels.

Program_Description: The goal of the Perinatal Outreach Program is to assure early and continuous prenatal care of all pregnant women.
Healthy Families provides support for families with newborns up to 3 months, including stress and risk-factor screening at birth.
Paternity Opportunity Program helps establish the legal process of determining the biological father of a child.
Target_Population: Unmarried parents seeking to establish paternity
